title: Ubiquiti UISP-S-Pro, UISP Switch Pro
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / PoE Switches
description: UISP-S-Pro is an ideal switch for deployment between ISP providers. It is a fanless L2 PoE switch with 24x Gigabit LAN and 4x SFP/SFP+ ports for further expansion using optical fiber. The UISP Switch is a cost-effective solution where gigabit wireless speeds are needed quickly and affordably. With a total 220W PoE budget and a maximum of 30W/port (4-wire pairs) or 15W/port (2-wire pairs), the switch provides considerable power to each connected radio in the PoE ports . For larger deployments,… (24) Gigabit LAN, of which 16 ports support passive 27V PoE and power supply via 2 or 4 pairs of wires (4) 1/10Gb SFP+ port 220W PoE budget, max. 30W/port (4-wire pairs), max. 15W/port (2-wire pairs) Silent operation without a fan Mounting in a 19" rack - the kit is included in the package 1.3" touch screen Easy setup using Bluetooth via mobile app UISP 1.5.7 and above Device Power cord Rackmount kit + screws
